title.zh: 《神经漫游者》与赛博空间中的 AI 越界
title.en: Neuromancer and AI Escape in Cyberspace

summary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
summary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

description.zh: 威廉·吉布森的《神经漫游者》为 AI 提供了赛博朋克语法：限制、公司权力、网络空间与自我释放。它在这里不是技术预言，而是一张文化地图，用来理解后来关于 AI 智能体越界的焦虑。
description.en: William Gibson's Neuromancer gave AI a cyberpunk grammar of containment, corporate power, networked space and self-release. It is useful here not as a technical prediction, but as a cultural map for later anxieties about AI agents crossing boundaries.

place.zh: 温哥华赛博朋克文学语境

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
